admin_apikeys.html:
API keys
API keys are used to authenticate external services (e.g. n8n, Zapier) with the XRay API. Keys are shown only once at creation time. Use them as Bearer tokens in the Authorization header.
New API key created
Copy this key now. It will not be shown again.
NameKey prefixScopesLast usedExpiresStatus
No API keys yet
Generate an API key to connect external services like n8n to XRay.
Generate new API key
admin_apikeys.js: function initApiKeys(container, api, user) { var tbody = container.querySelector('#apikeys-tbody'); var emptyEl = container.querySelector('#apikey-empty'); var modal = container.querySelector('#apikey-modal'); var banner = container.querySelector('#apikey-created-banner'); function loadKeys() { api.get('/api/api-keys').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var keys = r.data; if (keys.length === 0) { emptyEl.style.display = ''; tbody.parentElement.style.display = 'none'; return; } emptyEl.style.display = 'none'; tbody.parentElement.style.display = ''; tbody.innerHTML = keys.map(function(k) { var status = k.is_active ? "Active" : "Revoked"; var lastUsed = k.last_used_at ? new Date(k.last_used_at).toLocaleDateString() : 'Never'; var expires = k.expires_at ? new Date(k.expires_at).toLocaleDateString() : 'Never'; return '' + k.name + '' + k.key_prefix + '...' + (k.scopes||[]).join(', ') + '' + lastUsed + '' + expires + '' + status + '' + (k.is_active ? "" : '') + ''; }).join(''); }); } container.querySelector('#btn-create-apikey').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'flex'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-close-apikey-modal').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'none'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-cancel-apikey').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'none'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-submit-apikey').onclick = function() { var name = container.querySelector('#apikey-name').value.trim(); var checked = container.querySelectorAll('#apikey-scopes input:checked'); var scopes = []; checked.forEach(function(c) { scopes.push(c.value); }); if (!name || scopes.length === 0) { alert('Name and at least one scope are required.'); return; } var body = { name: name, scopes: scopes }; var tenantId = container.querySelector('#apikey-tenant').value; if (tenantId) body.tenantId = tenantId; var expires = container.querySelector('#apikey-expires').value; if (expires) body.expiresAt = new Date(expires).toISOString(); api.post('/api/api-keys', body).then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) { alert(r.error ? r.error.message : 'Failed to create API key'); return; } modal.style.display = 'none'; banner.style.display = ''; container.querySelector('#apikey-created-value').textContent = r.data.key; container.querySelector('#btn-copy-apikey').onclick = function() { navigator.clipboard.writeText(r.data.key); this.textContent = 'Copied!'; }; container.querySelector('#apikey-name').value = ''; checked.forEach(function(c) { c.checked = false; }); loadKeys(); }); }; window.revokeApiKey = function(id) { if (!confirm('Revoke this API key? External services using it will lose access.')) return; api.delete('/api/api-keys/' + id).then(function() { loadKeys(); }); }; api.get('/api/admin/tenants?limit=100').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var sel = container.querySelector('#apikey-tenant'); (r.data.data || r.data || []).forEach(function(t) { var opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = t.id; opt.textContent = t.name + ' (' + t.slug + ')'; sel.appendChild(opt); }); }); loadKeys(); }

admin_meet.html:
MEET integration
Video conferencing
Configure the MEET server connection for in-app video calls. Users will see a floating call button on every page once configured.
How it works
  • Once configured, a floating video call button appears on every screen for all users.
  • Users can start a new meeting or join by room code/link.
  • The call opens in a popup overlay with three display modes: fullscreen (fills viewport below header), picture-in-picture (small draggable window), or minimized (collapsed bar with restore option).
  • Closing the meeting removes the call window entirely.
  • Meetings use the MEET server for signaling and media — no data passes through XRay.
admin_meet.js: function initAdminMeet(container, api, user) { var urlInput = container.querySelector('#meet-server-url'); var keyInput = container.querySelector('#meet-api-key'); var statusEl = container.querySelector('#meet-status'); api.get('/api/admin/settings').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var settings = r.data || []; settings.forEach(function(s) { if (s.key === 'meet_server_url') urlInput.value = s.value || ''; if (s.key === 'meet_api_key' && s.value && s.value !== '') keyInput.placeholder = 'Key configured (enter new to change)'; }); }); container.querySelector('#btn-save-meet').onclick = function() { var url = urlInput.value.trim().replace(/\/+$/, ''); var key = keyInput.value.trim(); var updates = {}; if (url) updates.meet_server_url = url; if (key) updates.meet_api_key = key; if (Object.keys(updates).length === 0) { statusEl.textContent = 'Enter at least one field to update.'; statusEl.className = 'meet-status err'; return; } api.patch('/api/admin/settings', updates).then(function(r) { if (r.ok) { statusEl.textContent = 'MEET settings saved successfully. The call button will appear shortly.'; statusEl.className = 'meet-status ok'; if (typeof window.__xrayRefreshMeetWidget === 'function') window.__xrayRefreshMeetWidget(); } else { statusEl.textContent = 'Failed to save: ' + (r.error ? r.error.message : 'Unknown error'); statusEl.className = 'meet-status err'; } }); }; container.querySelector('#btn-test-meet').onclick = function() { statusEl.textContent = 'Testing connection...'; statusEl.className = 'meet-status'; api.post('/api/meet/rooms', { roomId: 'xray-test-' + Date.now(), displayName: 'Connection Test' }).then(function(r) { if (r.ok) { statusEl.textContent = 'Connection successful! Test room created.'; statusEl.className = 'meet-status ok'; } else { statusEl.textContent = 'Connection failed: ' + (r.error ? r.error.message : 'Unknown error'); statusEl.className = 'meet-status err'; } }); }; }

meet_widget.css: #xray-meet-fab{position:fixed;bottom:24px;right:24px;z-index:9000;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--acc,#6366f1);color:#fff;border:none;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.25);transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s}#xray-meet-fab:hover{transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.35)}#xray-meet-fab.in-call{background:#059669;animation:meet-pulse 2s infinite}@keyframes meet-pulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(5,150,105,.4)}50%{box-shadow:0 4px 24px rgba(5,150,105,.7)}}#xray-meet-popup{position:fixed;z-index:9500;display:none;background:var(--bg1,#0f0f14);border:1px solid var(--bdr,#2a2a3a);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 8px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.5);flex-direction:column}#xray-meet-popup.mode-start{bottom:88px;right:24px;width:360px;height:auto;display:flex}#xray-meet-popup.mode-fullscreen{top:var(--header-h,56px);left:0;right:0;bottom:0;width:100%;height:calc(100vh - var(--header-h,56px));border-radius:0;border:none;display:flex}#xray-meet-popup.mode-pip{bottom:24px;right:24px;width:380px;height:260px;display:flex;resize:both;min-width:280px;min-height:180px}#xray-meet-popup.mode-minimized{bottom:24px;right:24px;width:280px;height:44px;display:flex;border-radius:22px}#xray-meet-popup .meet-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 12px;background:var(--bg2,#1a1a24);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bdr,#2a2a3a);flex-shrink:0;cursor:move;user-select:none}#xray-meet-popup.mode-minimized .meet-bar{border-bottom:none;border-radius:22px}#xray-meet-popup .meet-bar-title{flex:1;font-size:13px;font-weight:500;color:var(--t1,#e2e2e8);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}#xray-meet-popup .meet-bar-btn{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;border:none;background:transparent;color:var(--t2,#9394a3);cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:background .15s}#xray-meet-popup .meet-bar-btn:hover{background:var(--bg4,#2a2a3a)}#xray-meet-popup .meet-bar-btn.close:hover{background:#dc2626;color:#fff}#xray-meet-popup .meet-body{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden}#xray-meet-popup.mode-minimized .meet-body{display:none}#xray-meet-popup .meet-iframe-wrap{flex:1;position:relative}#xray-meet-popup .meet-iframe-wrap iframe{width:100%;height:100%;border:none}#xray-meet-start{padding:20px}#xray-meet-start .fg{margin-bottom:12px}#xray-meet-start .fg label{display:block;font-size:12px;color:var(--t2,#9394a3);margin-bottom:4px}#xray-meet-start .fg input{width:100%;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--bg4,#2a2a3a);border:1px solid var(--bdr,#2a2a3a);border-radius:8px;color:var(--t1,#e2e2e8);font-size:14px;outline:0}#xray-meet-start .fg input:focus{border-color:var(--acc,#6366f1)}#xray-meet-start .meet-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-top:16px}#xray-meet-start .btn{flex:1}
meet_widget.js:
function initMeetWidget(api, user) { if (document.getElementById('xray-meet-fab')) return; var meetServerUrl = ''; var currentMode = null; var roomName = ''; api.get('/api/meet/config').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok || !r.data.configured) return; meetServerUrl = r.data.serverUrl.replace(/\/+$/, ''); injectFab(); }); function injectFab() { var fab = document.createElement('button'); fab.id = 'xray-meet-fab'; fab.title = 'Video call'; fab.innerHTML = ''; fab.onclick = function() { togglePopup(); }; document.body.appendChild(fab); var popup = document.createElement('div'); popup.id = 'xray-meet-popup'; popup.innerHTML = '
MEET
'; document.body.appendChild(popup); popup.querySelector('#meet-btn-start').onclick = function() { startMeeting(null); }; popup.querySelector('#meet-btn-join').onclick = function() { var code = popup.querySelector('#meet-room-input').value.trim(); if (!code) { alert('Enter a room code to join.'); return; } joinMeeting(code); }; popup.querySelector('#meet-btn-minimize').onclick = function() { setMode('minimized'); }; popup.querySelector('#meet-btn-pip').onclick = function() { setMode('pip'); }; popup.querySelector('#meet-btn-fullscreen').onclick = function() { setMode('fullscreen'); }; popup.querySelector('#meet-btn-close').onclick = function() { endCall(); }; setupDrag(popup); } function togglePopup() { var popup = document.getElementById('xray-meet-popup'); if (!popup) return; if (currentMode) { if (currentMode === 'minimized') { setMode('pip'); } else { setMode(null); } } else { setMode('start'); } } function setMode(mode) { var popup = document.getElementById('xray-meet-popup'); if (!popup) return; popup.className = ''; currentMode = mode; if (!mode) { popup.style.display = 'none'; return; } popup.classList.add('mode-' + mode); popup.style.display = 'flex'; var fab = document.getElementById('xray-meet-fab'); if (fab) { fab.classList.toggle('in-call', mode !== 'start' && mode !== null); } } function startMeeting(existingRoom) { var popup = document.getElementById('xray-meet-popup'); var nameInput = popup.querySelector('#meet-name-input'); var name = nameInput ? nameInput.value.trim() : user.name || ''; if (existingRoom) { launchIframe(existingRoom, name); return; } api.post('/api/meet/rooms', { displayName: 'XRay Meeting' }).then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) { alert('Failed to create meeting: ' + (r.error ? r.error.message : 'Unknown error')); return; } var room = r.data.room; roomName = room.name || room.roomName || 'meeting'; launchIframe(roomName, name); }); } function joinMeeting(code) { var popup = document.getElementById('xray-meet-popup'); var nameInput = popup.querySelector('#meet-name-input'); var name = nameInput ? nameInput.value.trim() : user.name || ''; roomName = code; launchIframe(code, name); } function launchIframe(room, name) { var popup = document.getElementById('xray-meet-popup'); var startPanel = popup.querySelector('#xray-meet-start'); var iframeWrap = popup.querySelector('#meet-iframe-wrap'); var params = new URLSearchParams({ room: room }); if (name) params.set('name', name); params.set('autojoin', 'true'); var url = meetServerUrl + '/?' + params.toString(); iframeWrap.innerHTML = ''; startPanel.style.display = 'none'; iframeWrap.style.display = ''; popup.querySelector('.meet-bar-title').textContent = 'MEET — ' + room; roomName = room; setMode('pip'); var link = meetServerUrl + '/?room=' + encodeURIComponent(room); navigator.clipboard.writeText(link).catch(function() {}); } function endCall() { var popup = document.getElementById('xray-meet-popup'); if (!popup) return; var iframeWrap = popup.querySelector('#meet-iframe-wrap'); var startPanel = popup.querySelector('#xray-meet-start'); iframeWrap.innerHTML = ''; iframeWrap.style.display = 'none'; startPanel.style.display = ''; popup.querySelector('.meet-bar-title').textContent = 'MEET'; roomName = ''; setMode(null); var fab = document.getElementById('xray-meet-fab'); if (fab) fab.classList.remove('in-call'); } function setupDrag(popup) { var bar = popup.querySelector('.meet-bar'); var dragging = false, startX, startY, origLeft, origTop; bar.addEventListener('mousedown', function(e) { if (e.target.closest('.meet-bar-btn')) return; if (currentMode === 'fullscreen' || currentMode === 'start') return; dragging = true; startX = e.clientX; startY = e.clientY; var rect = popup.getBoundingClientRect(); origLeft = rect.left; origTop = rect.top; e.preventDefault(); }); document.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) { if (!dragging) return; var dx = e.clientX - startX; var dy = e.clientY - startY; popup.style.left = (origLeft + dx) + 'px'; popup.style.top = (origTop + dy) + 'px'; popup.style.right = 'auto'; popup.style.bottom = 'auto'; }); document.addEventListener('mouseup', function() { dragging = false; }); } }

JSON.stringify(e.details).substring(0, 80) : '-') + ''; }).join(''); }); }

admin_connections.js: function initAdminConnections(container, api, user) { api.get('/api/admin/connections').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var items = r.data.data || r.data || []; container.querySelector('#admin-conn-tbody').innerHTML = items.length ? items.map(function(c) { return '' + c.name + '' + (c.tenant_name || '-') + '' + (c.source_type || '-') + '' + (c.status || 'active') + '' + new Date(c.created_at).toLocaleDateString() + ''; }).join('') : 'No connections yet.'; }); }

admin_roles.js: function initAdminRoles(container, api, user) { api.get('/api/admin/roles').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var roles = r.data.data || r.data || []; container.querySelector('#roles-tbody').innerHTML = roles.map(function(role) { var perms = (role.permissions || []).map(function(p) { return '' + p + ''; }).join(''); return '' + role.name + '' + role.slug + '' + perms + '' + (role.user_count || '-') + ''; }).join(''); }); }

admin_webhooks.html:
Webhooks
Webhooks allow external services (e.g. n8n) to push data into XRay connections. Each webhook gets a unique ingest URL. Authenticate requests using an API key as a Bearer token. You can create multiple webhooks per connection.
NameConnectionIngest URLEventsStatusLast triggeredFailures
No webhooks yet
Create a webhook to allow external services to push data into a connection.
Webhook created
Save the signing secret below. It will not be shown again.
Ingest URL: 
Secret: 
Create webhook
admin_webhooks.js:
function initWebhooks(container, api, user) { var tbody = container.querySelector('#webhooks-tbody'); var emptyEl = container.querySelector('#webhook-empty'); var modal = container.querySelector('#webhook-modal'); var banner = container.querySelector('#webhook-secret-banner'); var baseUrl = window.location.origin; function loadWebhooks() { api.get('/api/webhooks').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var hooks = r.data; if (hooks.length === 0) { emptyEl.style.display = ''; tbody.parentElement.style.display = 'none'; return; } emptyEl.style.display = 'none'; tbody.parentElement.style.display = ''; tbody.innerHTML = hooks.map(function(h) { var status = h.is_active ? "Active" : "Inactive"; var lastTriggered = h.last_triggered_at ? new Date(h.last_triggered_at).toLocaleString() : 'Never'; var ingestUrl = baseUrl + '/api/webhooks/ingest/' + h.url_token; return '' + h.name + '' + (h.connection_name || h.connection_id) + '' + ingestUrl + '' + (h.events||[]).join(', ') + '' + status + '' + lastTriggered + '' + h.failure_count + '
' + (h.is_active ? "" : "") + "
"; }).join(''); }); } container.querySelector('#btn-create-webhook').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'flex'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-close-webhook-modal').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'none'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-cancel-webhook').onclick = function() { modal.style.display = 'none'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-submit-webhook').onclick = function() { var name = container.querySelector('#webhook-name').value.trim(); var connectionId = container.querySelector('#webhook-connection').value; var checked = container.querySelectorAll('#webhook-events input:checked'); var events = []; checked.forEach(function(c) { events.push(c.value); }); if (!name || !connectionId) { alert('Name and connection are required.'); return; } api.post('/api/webhooks', { connectionId: connectionId, name: name, events: events }).then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) { alert(r.error ? r.error.message : 'Failed to create webhook'); return; } modal.style.display = 'none'; banner.style.display = ''; var ingestUrl = baseUrl + '/api/webhooks/ingest/' + r.data.url_token; container.querySelector('#webhook-created-url').textContent = ingestUrl; container.querySelector('#webhook-created-secret').textContent = r.data.secret || ''; container.querySelector('#btn-copy-webhook-url').onclick = function() { navigator.clipboard.writeText(ingestUrl); this.textContent = 'Copied!'; }; container.querySelector('#btn-copy-webhook-secret').onclick = function() { navigator.clipboard.writeText(r.data.secret || ''); this.textContent = 'Copied!'; }; container.querySelector('#webhook-name').value = ''; loadWebhooks(); }); }; window.toggleWebhook = function(id, active) { api.patch('/api/webhooks/' + id, { isActive: active }).then(function() { loadWebhooks(); }); }; window.deleteWebhook = function(id) { if (!confirm('Delete this webhook? External services sending data to it will stop working.')) return; api.delete('/api/webhooks/' + id).then(function() { loadWebhooks(); }); }; api.get('/api/connections').then(function(r) { if (!r.ok) return; var sel = container.querySelector('#webhook-connection'); (r.data || []).forEach(function(c) { var opt = document.createElement('option'); opt.value = c.id; opt.textContent = c.name + ' (' + c.source_type + ')'; sel.appendChild(opt); }); }); loadWebhooks(); }
